name: Text to PDF
description: Convert text into clean, downloadable PDFs instantly. Offline, private, powerful.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-src 'none';
